scripts.start: npx -y concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "magenta,cyan" "node backend/server.js" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "magenta,cyan" "node backend/server.js" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
